# isUnread

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that determines whether the message list item displays an unread indicator.

## Declaration

```swift
var isUnread: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

Configurations are immutable. To toggle the message list item’s unread indicator, create a new configuration and update the list item’s [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPMessageListItem/leadingConfiguration] property.

## Getting the Configuration’s State

- **leadingImage**: The configuration’s image.
